name: Compound Engineering
description: A dedicated dashboard surface for compound-engineering artifacts and interactive ce-* sessions.
author: Fusion Team

defaultProvider.label: Default Session Provider
defaultProvider.description: Model provider used for CE interactive sessions (for example anthropic). Leave blank to use the host default.

defaultModelId.label: Default Session Model
defaultModelId.description: Model ID within the provider used for CE interactive sessions. Leave blank to use the host default.

enabledStages.label: Enabled Stages
enabledStages.description: Stage IDs that may be launched from the Compound Engineering view (for example strategy, ideate, brainstorm, plan, work).

reconcileOnHooks.label: Reconcile on Board Changes
reconcileOnHooks.description: Run the board→pipeline reconcile sweep automatically after task move/complete hooks. Disable to only reconcile on demand.

reconcileIntervalMinutes.label: Reconcile Cadence (minutes)
reconcileIntervalMinutes.description: Cadence hint for how often an on-demand refresh surface sweeps the reconciler. Not a continuous poll loop.
